# Sprint Planning Template

Use this template to structure a sprint planning ceremony. Fill in each section during the planning session.

## Sprint Info

- **Sprint:** <Sprint number>
- **Duration:** <Start date> → <End date>
- **Team capacity:** <Available person-days>
- **Velocity (last 3 sprints):** <Average story points>

## Sprint Goals

Define 1–3 measurable goals for this sprint:

1. <Goal 1 — what will be true at the end of the sprint>
2. <Goal 2>
3. <Goal 3 (optional)>

## Capacity Planning

| Team Member | Available Days | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| <Name> | <Days> | <PTO, partial, etc.> |

**Total capacity:** <sum> person-days
**Recommended commitment:** <80% of velocity average> story points

## Selected Stories

| Issue | Title | Points | Assignee | Priority | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| #__ | <title> | <pts> | <name> | P1 | — |
| #__ | <title> | <pts> | <name> | P2 | Blocked by #__ |

**Total committed:** <sum> story points

## Stretch Goals

Stories that may be pulled in if the team finishes early:

| Issue | Title | Points |
|---|---|---|
| #__ | <title> | <pts> |

## Risks and Blockers

- <Known risk or dependency that could affect delivery>
- <External blocker or pending decision>

## Definition of Done

Each story is done when:

- [ ] Code is merged to `main` via PR
- [ ] Tests pass in CI
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one team member
- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified

## Action Items

| Action | Owner | Due |
|---|---|---|
| <action> | <name> | <date> |
